message:
test(fsci-arrayapi): add comprehensive unit tests and proptest suites for all Array API modules

The fsci-arrayapi crate had minimal test coverage. This adds thorough
unit and property-based tests across every module to validate correctness
before the conformance harness wires these operations into the P2C-007
differential testing pipeline.

backend.rs:
- Generated unit matrix test covering zeros/ones/empty/full across 8 shapes
  x 4 dtypes x 4 memory orders (500+ sub-cases), plus arange/linspace
  parameter sweeps, basic/hardened indexing boundary checks, broadcast
  shape commutativity, and dtype promotion commutativity
- Structured JSON test logging (StructuredTestLog) for CI observability
- 13 proptest suites (1000 cases each): zeros-are-zero for all 4 float
  dtypes, arange length correctness ascending/descending, broadcast shape
  commutativity, dtype promotion commutativity, reshape size preservation,
  transpose roundtrip value preservation, hardened slice far-bound
  rejection, and advanced index value selection

broadcast.rs:
- Tests for scalar/compatible/incompatible broadcast_shapes inputs
- promote_and_broadcast verifying dtype promotion + shape targeting
- Shape mismatch error propagation through promote_and_broadcast

creation.rs:
- Overflow-shape rejection for all 5 constructors (zeros/ones/empty/full/from_slice)
- Zero-step rejection for all ScalarValue variants in arange
- Shape/dtype verification for linspace and full with complex types

dtype.rs:
- default_float_dtype returns Float64 in both Strict and Hardened modes
- result_type delegation covering complex promotion, empty list default,
  force_floating integral passthrough, and integral-without-force rejection

error.rs:
- ArrayApiError kind/display round-trip verification
- ArrayApiResult type alias correctness for Ok and Err variants

indexing.rs:
- Mode/index expression mismatch rejection (basic mode + advanced expr)
- Success paths for getitem (basic slice), reshape, and transpose
- Boolean mask shape mismatch and rank-1 transpose error paths

Adds proptest, serde, and serde_json as dev-dependencies to fsci-arrayapi
(reflected in Cargo.lock).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
